message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title orderList表示

actor "配達員" as CourierActor
participant "Courieridform.jsp" as CourierIdForm
participant "OrderListServlet" as OrderListServlet
participant "CourierDAO" as CourierDAO
participant "Courier" as Courier
participant "Session" as Session
participant "OrderDAO" as OrderDAO
participant "Order" as Order
participant "DetailDAO" as DetailDAO
participant "Detail" as Detail
participant "Request" as Request
participant "orderedlist.jsp" as OrderedListJsp

CourierActor -> CourierIdForm: courierID入力
activate CourierIdForm
CourierIdForm -> OrderListServlet: リンク
deactivate CourierIdForm
activate OrderListServlet

OrderListServlet -> CourierDAO: findByCourierid()
activate CourierDAO
CourierDAO -> Courier: 生成
activate Courier
Courier -->> OrderListServlet: Courier
deactivate Courier
deactivate CourierDAO

OrderListServlet -> Session: Courier
OrderListServlet -> OrderDAO: findAll()
activate OrderDAO
OrderDAO -> Order: 生成
activate Order
Order -> DetailDAO: findByOrderid()
activate DetailDAO
DetailDAO -> Detail: リスト生成
activate Detail
Detail -->> OrderDAO: ArrayList<Detail>
deactivate Detail
deactivate DetailDAO
OrderDAO -> Order: setDetail (ArrayList<Detail>)
Order -->> OrderListServlet: ArrayLisr<Order>
deactivate Order
deactivate OrderDAO

OrderListServlet -> Request: setAttribute(ArrayList<Order>)
OrderListServlet -> OrderedListJsp: フォワード
deactivate OrderListServlet
activate OrderedListJsp
OrderedListJsp --> CourierActor: 表示
deactivate OrderedListJsp

@enduml
```
